name: Apple Walnut Triangles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped apples, nuts, lemon peel, sugar, and nutmeg in a medium bowl. Mix well to blend the flavors and set aside.
2. Unroll the phyllo dough sheets. Cut the dough lengthwise into 2-inch wide strips. Place them on waxed paper over damp towels.
3. Cover all dough strips except for two of them. Brush the two uncovered strips with melted butter.
4. Place about 2 teaspoons of the filling in the center of each strip, about 1 inch from the top edge.
5. Fold one corner of each strip over the filling, then fold it again like a flag until the entire strip is folded.
6. Place the folded pastries on a buttered baking pan measuring 10x15 inches with sides.
7. Repeat steps 3-5 with the remaining filling and phyllo strips.
8. Brush the folded pastries, top, and bottom with melted butter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Optionally, sprinkle with sifted powdered sugar before serving.
